content: Phase 2: Backend - all routers, services, access control (VERIFIED via curl)
Phase 2: Frontend - all 9 pages, components, charts, api client, dark mode, sample-data banner, auth (RENDERING VERIFIED via screenshots)
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 (backend + frontend)
Phase 2: Fix any issues found in testing
Phase 3: Stripe subscriptions + access-control enforcement verification
Phase 4: Delivery artifacts (docker-compose, .env.example, scripts/seed.py, README) + final testing
